sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى فَارِسٌ تَذَاكِرَ السِّينَمَا لَهُ وَلِصَدِيقِهِ.
sentences.translation: Faris je kupio karte za kino za sebe i prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: Faris bought cinema tickets for himself and his friend.

sentences.translation: Cijena dviju karata bila je razumna.
sentences.translationEn: The price of the two tickets was reasonable.

sentences.translation: Faris je s radošću platio za obojicu.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَ صَدِيقُهُ أَنْ يَدْفَعَ فِي المَرَّةِ القَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prijatelj mu je obećao da će platiti sljedeći put.
sentences.translationEn: His friend promised to pay next time.

sentences.translation: Uživali su u filmu i izašli veseli.
sentences.translationEn: They enjoyed the film and left happy.
